subtasks.description: Query 2024 quarterly revenue/spend by publisher, calculate quarter-over-quarter trends, and identify publishers with declining QoQ metrics across Q1-Q4 2024

Reconcile declining publisher trends with current contract state (MongoDB) and historical performance metrics (SQL), classify renewal posture (hold/expand/reduce) based on trend severity and contract value, generate renewal recommendations

plan.cost_rationale: Two subtasks required: (1) sql_gen (mid-tier) to fetch 2024 quarterly trends across all publishers with QoQ decline calculations—multi-table join with aggregate windowing to compare quarters. (2) cross_recon (mid-tier) to reconcile SQL trend output with MongoDB contract state and generate renewal recommendations (hold/expand/reduce) based on trend severity and value. Classification and recommendation generation are native to cross_recon, not separate policy_action. Both tasks are mid-complexity: the SQL needs aggregation + trend logic; cross_recon needs multi-source reconciliation but not frontier-level inference. Avoided unnecessary task proliferation: recommendation generation is part of reconciliation, not a separate subtask.

output.raw_output:
{"sql": "WITH quarterly_revenue AS (
  SELECT
    publisher,
    fiscal_quarter,
    SUM(amount_usd) AS total_revenue
  FROM consumption_facts
  WHERE event_date >= '2024-01-01'
    AND event_date < '2025-01-01'
  GROUP BY publisher, fiscal_quarter
),
pivoted AS (
  SELECT
    publisher,
    MAX(CASE WHEN fiscal_quarter = 1 THEN total_revenue ELSE 0 END) AS q1,
    MAX(CASE WHEN fiscal_quarter = 2 THEN total_revenue ELSE 0 END) AS q2,
    MAX(CASE WHEN fiscal_quarter = 3 THEN total_revenue ELSE 0 END) AS q3,
    MAX(CASE WHEN fiscal_quarter = 4 THEN total_revenue ELSE 0 END) AS q4
  FROM quarterly_revenue
  GROUP BY publisher
),
trends AS (
  SELECT
    publisher,
    q1,
    q2,
    q3,
    q4,
    ROUND(CASE WHEN q1 > 0 THEN ((q2 - q1) / q1) * 100 ELSE NULL END, 2) AS q1_to_q2_pct,
    ROUND(CASE WHEN q2 > 0 THEN ((q3 - q2) / q2) * 100 ELSE NULL END, 2) AS q2_to_q3_pct,
    ROUND(CASE WHEN q3 > 0 THEN ((q4 - q3) / q3) * 100 ELSE NULL END, 2) AS q3_to_q4_pct,
    (CASE WHEN q2 < q1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END +
     CASE WHEN q3 < q2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END +
     CASE WHEN q4 < q3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS declining_quarters_count
  FROM pivoted
),
declining_publishers AS (
  SELECT *
  FROM trends
  WHERE declining_quarters_count >= 2
)
SELECT
  publisher,
  q1,
  q2,
  q3,
  q4,
  q1_to_q2_pct,
  q2_to_q3_pct,
  q3_to_q4_pct,
  declining_quarters_count,
  CASE
    WHEN declining_quarters_count = 3
      AND q3_to_q4_pct < -20 THEN 'reduce'
    WHEN declining_quarters_count = 3
      AND (q3_to_q4_pct >= -20 OR q3_to_q4_pct IS NULL) THEN 'hold'
    WHEN declining_quarters_count = 2
      AND q4 > q1 THEN 'hold'
    WHEN declining_quarters_count =
